evals.prompt: Analyze the business requirements for this new feature: Allow chat room admins to pin important messages to the top of the chat room so that all members can quickly view them.
evals.expected_output: Structured business analysis identifying goals, stakeholders, scope, socket/API dependencies, message deletion edge cases, and acceptance criteria.
expectations: The analysis identifies 'chat room admins' and 'members' as Stakeholders.
The analysis identifies Socket real-time updates (SocketCluster) as a Dependency.
The analysis identifies message deletion (either by the author or an admin) as an Edge Case.
The analysis includes a section for 'Acceptance Criteria'.
The analysis includes a section for 'Assumptions'.
The analysis is structured with Goals, Scope, Dependencies, Edge Cases & Risks, and Acceptance Criteria.
